note: Prompts are built from symprec=0.1 conventionalized validation GT CIFs, matching the recovered GT-SG test-anchor prompt semantics rather than direct P1 CSV extraction. Ranks 1-20 preserve the historical CrystaLLM-a GT-SG anchor policy. Ranks 21-100 are expanded candidate pools with multiple temperatures/top-k values. Normalized token logprob is not emitted by the upstream generator yet and must be backfilled before rerank feature freezing.
prompt_order: sorted prompt filename stems; matches generate_cifs_from_prompts_dir.py slicing
